data.description: Pool Corp. announces 2025 year end and fourth quarter results, along with 2026 earnings guidance.

data.title: LKQ Corporation reports Q4 and full year 2025 results.
data.description: The recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in a decade. This decrease represents a total of 300,000 individuals finding employment. The job market also saw an increase in new job openings, reaching a total of 400,000 positions available for job seekers. These numbers highlight a positive trend in the country's economy, showing signs of recovery and growth in the labor market. Experts attribute this improvement to various factors, including government policies and increased consumer confidence.

data.title: HA Sustainable Infrastructure Capital, Inc. priced $600 million offering of 7.125% green junior subordinated notes due 2056.
data.description: Annapolis, Maryland - HA Sustainable Infrastructure Capital, Inc. (NYSE: HASI), a key player in sustainable infrastructure investments, recently disclosed the pricing details of its latest venture. On February 18, 2026, the company successfully priced a registered public offering of $600 million in total principal of 7.125% green junior subordinated notes due by 2056, named the "Notes." These Notes will be backed, on a subordinated level, by Hannon Armstrong Sustainable Infrastructure at the time of issuance.

data.title: Evergy (NASDAQ: EVRG) reports 2025 GAAP earnings of $855.6 million, $3.66 per share, down from $873.5 million in 2024. Q4 earnings reached $84.3 million, $0.36 per share, up from $78.2 million in Q4 2024.
data.description: In Missouri, Evergy, Inc. (NASDAQ: EVRG) revealed its full-year 2025 GAAP earnings as $855.6 million, equating to $3.66 per share. This marks a decline from the $873.5 million in GAAP earnings, corresponding to $3.79 per share, reported for full-year 2024. The fourth quarter of 2025 saw GAAP earnings of $84.3 million ($0.36 per share), higher than the $78.2 million in earnings ($0.34 per share) from the same period in 2024. Evergy's non-GAAP adjusted earnings for full-year 2025 were not disclosed.

data.title: Expro Group Holdings N.V. reports Q4 2025 revenue of $382M with net income of $6M and strong adjusted EBITDA of $88M.
data.description: Expro Group Holdings N.V. (NYSE: XPRO) released its financial and operational results for the fourth quarter of 2025, along with full year 2026 guidance. The highlights include a revenue of $382 million, with a net income of $6 million and a net income margin of 2%. The company also reported an adjusted EBITDA of $88 million and an adjusted EBITDA margin of 23.1%, placing it among the top in its peer group. Additionally, Expro generated a cash flow from operations of $57 million.

data.title: Etsy Inc. reports Q4 2025 results: GMS $3.59B, +2.4% YoY; revenue $881.6M, +6.6% YoY; Net income: $110.7M. Depop sold to eBay for $1.2B.
data.description: Etsy reported its fourth quarter and full-year financial results for 2025, noting slight growth in Gross Merchandise Sales (GMS) to $3.6 billion in Q4, up 2.4% excluding Reverb. Revenue was $881.6 million, up 6.6% year-over-year. Net income was $110.7 million, down $19.2 million due to foreign exchange changes. The Etsy marketplace saw a GMS of $3.3 billion with 5.6 million active sellers and 86.5 million active buyers. Etsy's earnings were solid with key financial metrics such as Adjusted EBITDA at $222.5 million. Depop, a subsidiary of Etsy, observed a GMS of $299.7 million, up 37.2% year-over-year. Etsy plans to sell Depop to eBay for $1.2 billion. In Q1 2026, Etsy expects GMS of $2.38-2.43 billion with a consistent Take Rate and Adjusted EBITDA margin of 25.2%.
Alamos Gold to refile 2025 financial statements after administrative error.

data.title: Garrett Motion announces strong 2025 results, expansion of technology portfolio, and outlook for 2026.
data.description: Garrett Motion has announced impressive results for the year 2025, showcasing significant growth in its zero-emission and industrial technology portfolio. The company also disclosed its plans for the year 2026. The figures reflect a strong performance, with notable increases in key areas. Garrett Motion is emphasizing its commitment to expanding its offerings in sustainability and industrial advancements, highlighting its dedication to innovation and progress in line with current market trends and demands.

data.title: Lithium Americas updates on Thacker Pass project in Nevada, sets 2026 Capex guidance with milestones. Key year: 2025.
data.description: Lithium Americas Corp. (TSX: LAC) (NYSE: LAC) based in Vancouver, British Columbia, has released an update on their Thacker Pass project in Nevada. They reported on the project's progress for the year ending December 31, 2025, as well as provided details on their capital expenditure (Capex) guidance for 2026. In addition, they outlined the project development milestones expected to be achieved in 2026. The Company stated that 2025 marked a significant year for Lithium Americas and the Thacker Pass Project, with Phase 1 construction already in progress.

data.title: Quanta Services anticipates double-digit growth in 2026, aiming for over 20% EPS increase and a record backlog. Q4 revenue reached $7.84 billion.
data.description: The projected guidance for the full year of 2026 indicates a substantial increase in revenues, net income, and adjusted EBITDA, all expected to grow at a double-digit rate. The guidance range for 2026 suggests a possibility of achieving over 20% growth in earnings per share. It is anticipated that a record backlog will be attained in 2026. As for the fourth quarter of 2025, consolidated revenues were reported at $7.84 billion.

data.title: Wheels Up reports significant improvement with first positive Adjusted EBITDAR; record operational reliability in Q4.
data.description: There has been a notable decrease in net loss and the achievement of a positive adjusted EBITDAR for the first time, largely due to benefits derived from fleet transition and cost reduction efforts. Operational reliability has hit record highs in the fourth quarter. This progress can be attributed to the fleet modernization projects, the launch of the Signature Membership program, and the partnership formed with Delta.

data.title: GreenBridge receives $10M ABL credit facility from Jovian Capital Management for funding.
data.description: In Dallas on February 19, 2026, GreenBridge Funding, LLC announced securing a senior secured revolving Asset-Based Lending (ABL) credit facility from Jovian Capital Management. The facility offers GreenBridge a maximum total borrowing capacity of $10 million. The company plans to utilize the proceeds from this credit facility for various purposes.

data.title: Visteon posts strong financial results for 2025: $3,768 million net sales, $201 million net income for full year.
data.description: Visteon Corporation, based in Van Buren Township, Michigan, released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full-year 2025. During Q4, the company reported net sales of $948 million, totaling $3,768 million for the entire year. Net income for the fourth quarter amounted to $74 million.

data.title: Coinbase CEO believes quantum computing won't affect blockchain encryption, citing advisory council support.
data.description: The concerns regarding the potential threat of quantum computing compromising blockchain encryption were dismissed by Brian Armstrong. He highlighted the formation of Coinbase's advisory council as a significant development. Armstrong's reassurance comes amidst growing apprehensions in the blockchain community regarding the security of current encryption methods in the face of quantum computing advancements. This move from Armstrong follows the establishment of Coinbase's advisory council, a strategic decision that aims to address emerging issues in the blockchain space. The new council comprises experts and professionals from diverse fields, bringing a wealth of knowledge and experience to navigate potential challenges. Armstrong’s emphasis on this development reflects a proactive approach to enhancing security measures within the blockchain industry. The council is expected to provide valuable insights and guidance as the sector continues to evolve and adapt to technological advancements. With a strong focus on collaboration and proactive measures, Coinbase and its advisory council are poised to strengthen blockchain security and resilience in the face of emerging threats.
